title: Konodoga wa Saisei Dekimasen: The Movie
original_title: この動画は再生できません THE MOVIE
overview: Editor Ejiri and occult writer Onigashira work on the horror DVD series Truly Terrifying Submitted Videos. They receive various cursed footage, including DVDs found in a bankrupt film company’s warehouse, livestreams of self-proclaimed vigilantes exploring abandoned buildings, and a strange variety show featuring comedians and gravure idols. Using his expertise and sharp intuition, Ejiri unravels the hidden secrets behind these videos.
